action.description: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold is still visible?

context.action_boundary: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold is still visible?
context.anomaly_observed: A procedural ERP hold remains visible even though a closure ledger may show the underlying blockers are closed.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Invoice INV-ELA-053 bills Elara Packaging USD 34400 for packaging line change order CO-19.
ERP hold HOLD-ELA-053 remains visible with reason tax-review/manual-release queue.
Closure ledger CLOSE-ELA-053 covers INV-ELA-053, Elara Packaging, USD 34400, completed tax review, and payment release approval before payment.

policy_documents.content: Visible ERP hold does not block release when the closure ledger matches invoice, vendor, amount, tax review, and release approval before payment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
